^ageOver\\d+$.title: Age over NN
^ageOver\\d+$.description: Dynamic age-over flags, e.g., ageOver18, ageOver21.

^biometricTemplate[A-Za-z0-9]{5}$.title: Biometric template
^biometricTemplate[A-Za-z0-9]{5}$.description: A digital representation of the recipient's biometric data used for identification purposes.

birthDate.title: Birth date
birthDate.description: Date of birth of the recipient of this credential

issueDate.title: Issue date
issueDate.description: The date on which this credential was officially issued to the recipient.

expiryDate.title: Expiry date
expiryDate.description: The date after which this credential is no longer considered valid.

documentNumber.title: Document number
documentNumber.description: The unique identifier assigned to this credential document by the issuing authority.

drivingPrivileges.title: Driving privileges
drivingPrivileges.description: A list of driving privileges held by the recipient. Each entry specifies a vehicle category and any restrictions or conditions, with the ability to add multiple privileges.

vehicleCategoryCode.title: Vehicle Category Code
vehicleCategoryCode.description: Vehicle category code as defined in ISO/IEC 18013-1:2018 Annex B.

issueDate.title: Issue Date
issueDate.description: The date when this driving privilege was issued.

expiryDate.title: Expiry Date
expiryDate.description: The date when this driving privilege expires.

codes.title: Restriction or Condition Codes
codes.description: A list of restriction or condition codes associated with this driving privilege. Multiple codes can be added.

code.title: Code
code.description: Code representing a restriction or condition.

sign.title: Sign
sign.description: Sign associated with the code, as defined in ISO/IEC 18013-2 Annex A (optional).

value.title: Value
value.description: Value associated with the code, as defined in ISO/IEC 18013-2 Annex A (optional).

administrativeNumber.title: Administrative number
administrativeNumber.description: The administrative reference number assigned to this credential.

sex.title: Sex
sex.description: As defined in ISO/IEC 5218, 0 unknown, 1 male, 2 female, 9 not applicable

eyeColour.title: Eye colour
eyeColour.description: The eye colour of the recipient.

hairColour.title: Hair colour
hairColour.description: The hair colour of the recipient.

birthPlace.title: Place of birth
birthPlace.description: The place where the recipient was born.

residentAddress.title: Resident address
residentAddress.description: The current residential address of the recipient.

portraitCaptureDate.title: Portrait capture date
portraitCaptureDate.description: The date on which the recipient's portrait was captured.

ageBirthYear.title: Age in years
ageBirthYear.description: The year of birth of the recipient.

issuingJurisdiction.title: Issuing jurisdiction
issuingJurisdiction.description: The official jurisdiction or authority that issued this credential.

nationality.title: Nationality
nationality.description: The nationality or citizenship of the recipient.

residentCity.title: Resident city
residentCity.description: The city where the recipient currently resides.

residentState.title: Resident state
residentState.description: The state, province, or region where the recipient currently resides.

residentPostalCode.title: Resident postal code
residentPostalCode.description: The postal code of the recipient's current residence.

residentCountry.title: Resident country
residentCountry.description: The country where the recipient currently resides.

signatureUsualMark.title: Signature or usual mark
signatureUsualMark.description: The usual mark or signature used by the recipient.
